response: Inflation is projected to decline further to 2.0% in Advanced economies in 2025 47. Speaker, inflation remains a key concern across the ECOWAS region, with an average inflation rate of 11.5 percent projected for 2025, down from 13.2 percent in 2024. Sources: [pdf:page-18], [pdf:page-20]
